Poker Hand #HD4444444444: Hold'em No Limit ($0.05/$0.10) - 2024/01/15 20:33:00
Table 'Rush&Cash1' 6-Max Seat #4 is the button
Seat 1: Villain1 ($10.00 in chips)
Seat 2: Hero ($8.50 in chips)
Seat 3: Villain2 ($10.00 in chips)
Seat 4: Villain3 ($10.00 in chips)
Seat 5: Villain4 ($10.00 in chips)
Seat 6: Villain5 ($10.00 in chips)
Villain4: posts small blind $0.05
Villain5: posts big blind $0.10
*** HOLE CARDS ***
Dealt to Hero [8h 8c]
Villain1: folds [Fast Fold]
Hero: raises $0.20 to $0.30
Villain2: folds [Fast Fold]
Villain3: folds
Villain4: folds
Villain5: raises $0.70 to $0.80
Hero: raises $7.70 to $8.50 and is all-in
Villain5: calls $7.70
*** FLOP *** [5d 6h 7c]
*** TURN *** [5d 6h 7c] [9s]
*** RUN IT TWICE ***
*** FIRST RUNOUT *** [5d 6h 7c 9s] [2h]
*** SECOND RUNOUT *** [5d 6h 7c 9s] [Ts]
*** SHOW DOWN ***
Hero: shows [8h 8c] (a straight, Five to Nine)
Villain5: shows [Ah As] (a pair of Aces)
Hero collected $8.50 from pot (first runout)
Villain5 collected $8.50 from pot (second runout)
*** SUMMARY ***
Total pot $17.50 | Rake $0.50
Board [5d 6h 7c 9s]
Seat 2: Hero showed [8h 8c] and won ($8.50) on first runout
